subtitle.ja: はじめの構えから始めます。両手親指で小指の糸を上から取り、親指と小指に糸を巻き付けます
subtitle.en: From "Position 1", with both thumbs, move over and pick down the little-finger strings, winding them onto the thumbs and little fingers.

subtitle.ja: 両手親指で、小指の糸を下から取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, pick up from below the little-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 両手小指で、親指の糸を下から取ります
subtitle.en: With both little fingers, pick up from below the thumb strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の中指で、反対側の手のひらにある下側の1本の糸を下から取り合います
subtitle.en: With both middle fingers, pick up from below the single lower palm string on the opposite hand.

subtitle.ja: 左右の小指から、小指同士を繋いでいる1本の糸だけを外します
subtitle.en: From both little fingers, release only the single string that runs between them.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指から、親指同士を繋いでいる1本の糸だけを外して完成です
subtitle.en: From both thumbs, release only the single string that runs between them to complete the figure.
